tasks.label: BB stop
args: port_pids=$(ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | awk '/:1420 / {print $NF}' | sed -n 's/.*pid=\([0-9][0-9]*\).*/\1/p' | sort -u); tauri_pids=$(pgrep -f 'target/debug/border-agents|tauri dev|border-agents' 2>/dev/null | sort -u); pids=$(printf '%s\n%s\n' "$port_pids" "$tauri_pids" | awk 'NF' | sort -u); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; echo "Stopped Border Buddies desktop/dev processes."; else echo "No Border Buddies desktop/dev processes found."; fi

tasks.label: BB clean cache
args: rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite .vite target src-tauri/target && echo "Cleaned Border Buddies build and dev caches."
